name: The Kinks
bio: The Kinks has a catalog with durable streaming, playlist, publishing, and licensing value that makes it a useful future addition to How Much Music.
notable_for: The Kinks is best known here for signature songs that remain recognizable enough to support long-tail catalog demand.
career_highlight: Songs like You Really Got Me and Waterloo Sunset can anchor the artist page with clear catalog economics and internal links.
revenue_drivers: Classic catalog streaming keeps the best-known songs active across generations.
Radio memory, playlists, and sync use support durable long-tail earnings.
Publishing and master rights can materially change the final artist-side share.
